CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS Dinosaurs (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), period VARCHAR(30), diet VARCHAR(20), length_m DECIMAL(4,1), weight_tons DECIMAL(5,2), discovered_year INT, continent VARCHAR(30))
